DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT REQUEST FOR APPLICATION FOR COURT JUDGMENT, DEMAND $20,000. COST $2,000. ATTY. FEES $512.52 TOTAL $22,511.52. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIF CAPITAL GROUP, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIF CAPITAL GROUP, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONECUTTER, DAVID KAPPUS, PAUL $20,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,000.00 INTEREST, $511.52 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,511.52, ALSO PLTF. SHALL RECOVER POST-JUDGMENT INTEREST AT THE RATE OF $10% PER ANNUM ON THE JUDGMENT AND ALL ATTY. FEES AND COST INCURRED IN ENFORCING THIS JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIF CAPITAL GROUP, LLC.
